meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project ideas. Master high-conversion user onboarding for your clients using Antigravity and Claude Code with this advanced checklist.
content.answer_block: Transform client-less stagnation into a high-value service by productizing user onboarding. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative refinement, you build automated, high-conversion experiences that solve the 'no project' dilemma while delivering immediate, measurable ROI to your clients' SaaS products.
content.intro:
The blank screen is a freelancer's most expensive enemy. You’re staring at a void, waiting for a 'brilliant idea' while your billable hours evaporate. The truth? Clients don't pay for your ideas; they pay for your ability to solve their friction points. The most overlooked, high-impact area in any SaaS is the first 60 seconds of the user experience.

When you master user onboarding, you stop being a developer and become a growth architect. By building modular, intelligent onboarding flows, you solve the 'no project' problem by turning simple onboarding requests into high-ticket UX optimization projects. Let’s build the systems that turn cold sign-ups into power users.

steps.title: Audit the Friction Path
steps.description: Identify the drop-off points in an existing app's sign-up flow. Map the 'Aha!' moment to the shortest possible path.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase and identify the current user sign-up flow. Create a Mermaid diagram showing the path from landing page to first core action. Highlight drop-off risks.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'map user flow and identify bottlenecks'

steps.title: Build Modular Onboarding Components
steps.description: Create reusable React/Vue components that can be injected into any app, ensuring your work is portable and sellable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a headless, themeable onboarding component library using Tailwind. Include a progress tracker, tooltips, and a feature spotlight modal.

steps.title: Implement Intelligent State Management
steps.description: Use state machines to track user progress through the onboarding flow, ensuring they never see the same prompt twice.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the onboarding flow to use XState. Ensure state persistence across sessions using local storage.

steps.title: Integrate Contextual AI Guidance
steps.description: Add an AI-powered assistant that guides users based on their specific behavior, not just a static script.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Integrate an AI-driven nudge system that triggers tips based on user interaction patterns. Use the provided API schema.

steps.title: Optimize for Analytics and Conversion
steps.description: Ensure every interaction is tracked so you can prove the value of your onboarding work to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Inject telemetry events into all onboarding steps. Create a dashboard mock-up that visualizes conversion rates per step.

pro_tips: Always build onboarding as a decoupled micro-frontend so you can drop it into any client project without refactoring.
Use 'Empty State' design to bridge the gap between new sign-ups and real data; never show a blank dashboard.
Implement 'Progressive Profiling'—ask for user data only when it's immediately required for them to see value.
Package your onboarding flow as a reusable NPM package to speed up future client deployments.
Offer A/B testing as a premium add-on by default; it doubles your project value for minimal extra dev time.
content.next_steps: Deploy your modular onboarding component to a private repository and reach out to three previous clients offering a free 'Onboarding Health Audit' to land your first paid integration.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project—build the systems that make every project perfect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
